text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 “BLOCKADE the BLOCKADE is more powerful than bombs” — Don Tzu 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 “封锁封锁比炸弹更强大” — 唐子 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Karmiel, and the surrounding areas of the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区卡尔米耶尔及其周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Discovery of a Significant Cache of Semi-Heavy Ammunition in Hoveyzeh 🔹 Hoveyzeh County Prosecutor: Through the intelligence monitoring by the IRGC Intelligence Organization of Khuzestan, 18 rockets and RPG charges were discovered in one of the areas of Hoveyzeh County. 🔹 Counter-revolutionary elements intended to transfer this shipment with the aim of creating insecurity in the region, but their plan was foiled thanks to the vigilance of the IRGC Intelligence Organization forces. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 在胡泽斯坦省霍韦泽发现大量半重型弹药 🔹 霍韦泽县检察官：通过胡泽斯坦省伊斯兰革命卫队情报组织的监控，在霍韦泽县某地区发现了18枚火箭弹和RPG弹药。🔹 反革命分子企图转移这批物资以在该地区制造动荡，但由于伊斯兰革命卫队情报组织部队的警惕，他们的计划被挫败。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he thinks the current negotiations are "Very successful" and that he is optimistic about the results: "I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now, and I think it'll be if it if it happens…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he himself would go to Islamabad if needed to "seal the deal:" Reporter: "Would you ever go to Pakistan to seal the deal yourself?" Trump: "I would. I would go to Pakistan. Yeah. Pakistan has been great. They've been so good. Islamabad, I'll be I might go." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他认为目前的谈判‘非常成功’，并对结果持乐观态度：‘我认为我们现在进行的谈判非常成功，如果……如果它发生的话……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果有必要，他本人会前往伊斯兰堡以“达成协议”：记者：“您会亲自去巴基斯坦达成协议吗？”特朗普：“我会的。我会去巴基斯坦。是的。巴基斯坦一直很棒。他们一直很好。伊斯兰堡，我会……我可能会去。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran has agreed to handover its uranium over: "Iran's agreed to that and they've agreed to it very powerfully. They've agreed to give us back the nuclear dust. It's way underground because of the attack we made…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he thinks the current negotiations are "Very successful" and that he is optimistic about the results: "I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now, and I think it'll be if it if it happens, it'll be announced fairly soon, and that'll give us free oil, free hornuz Strait. Everything will be nice. And I think your oil price will go down to lower than what it was before. And I think a lot of good things will happen." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗已同意交出其铀：‘伊朗已经同意了，而且他们同意得非常有力度。他们同意把核尘埃还给我们。因为我们发动的袭击，它现在在地下很深的地方……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他认为目前的谈判“非常成功”，并对结果持乐观态度：“我认为我们现在进行的谈判非常成功，如果……如果它发生的话，很快就会宣布，这将给我们带来免费的石油、免费的霍尔木兹海峡。一切都会很好。我认为你们的油价会降到比以前更低。我认为很多好事将会发生。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the conflict would reignite if there is no deal with Iran: Reporter: "If there's no deal, would you be willing to extend the ceasefire, or will the fighting resume, mister president?" Trump: "I would say the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran has agreed to handover its uranium over: "Iran's agreed to that and they've agreed to it very powerfully. They've agreed to give us back the nuclear dust. It's way underground because of the attack we made with the B-2 bombers." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果与伊朗没有达成协议，冲突将重新点燃：记者：‘如果没有达成协议，您是否愿意延长停火协议，还是战斗会恢复，总统先生？’特朗普：‘我会说……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗已同意交出其铀：‘伊朗已经同意了，而且他们同意得非常有力度。他们同意把核尘埃还给我们。因为我们用B-2轰炸机发动的袭击，它现在在地下很深的地方。’” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the blockade on Iran is wonderful: "The blockade has been incredible. It's held. They're not doing any business. They're unable to do any business because of the blockade. And so, the combination of having…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the conflict would reignite if there is no deal with Iran: Reporter: "If there's no deal, would you be willing to extend the ceasefire, or will the fighting resume, mister president?" Trump: "I would say the fighting if there's no deal, fighting resumes." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对伊朗的封锁非常棒：‘封锁令人难以置信。它坚持住了。他们没有做任何生意。由于封锁，他们无法做任何生意。所以，结合……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果与伊朗没有达成协议，冲突将重新点燃：记者：‘如果没有达成协议，您是否愿意延长停火协议，还是战斗会恢复，总统先生？’特朗普：‘我会说，如果没有达成协议，战斗就会恢复。’” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Iran has agreed to not have a nuclear weapon; they have agreed to it very powerfully. They have agreed to give us back the nuclear dust. We have a lot of agreement with Iran, and I think something is going to happen very positive. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：伊朗已同意不拥有核武器；他们已经非常有力度地同意了这一点。他们同意把核尘埃还给我们。我们与伊朗达成了很多协议，我认为将会发生非常积极的事情。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: Turkish President Erdogan: Israel, which openly expresses a plan to turn the West Bank into a new Gaza, is seeking to revive the shame of apartheid—32 years after its collapse in South Africa—through the death penalty it has imposed on Palestinian prisoners.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：以色列公开表达了将西岸变成另一个加沙的计划，这是在南非种族隔离制度崩溃32年后，通过对巴勒斯坦囚犯实施死刑，试图重演种族隔离的耻辱。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they are looking into reports of the sudden deaths of U.S. scientists, with Trump "hoping" it was random, adding that they are looking at possible foreign interference: Well, I hope it's random, but we're going…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the blockade on Iran is wonderful: "The blockade has been incredible. It's held. They're not doing any business. They're unable to do any business because of the blockade. And so, the combination of having no navy, no air force, and no anti-aircraft equipment means they have nothing. Everything is gone, including their leaders. Now they have a new set of leaders, and we find them very reasonable." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他们正在调查有关美国科学家突然死亡的报道，特朗普‘希望’这只是随机事件，并补充说他们正在调查是否存在外国干预：嗯，我希望这是随机的，但我们将会……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对伊朗的封锁非常棒：“封锁令人难以置信。它奏效了。他们没有进行任何商业活动。由于封锁，他们无法进行任何商业活动。因此，没有海军、没有空军、没有防空装备，意味着他们一无所有。一切都消失了，包括他们的领导人。现在他们有了一批新的领导人，我们发现他们非常通情达理。” @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ A short while ago, the Commander of the Pakistan Army met with the President Masoud Pezeshkian. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 不久前，巴基斯坦陆军司令会见了马苏德·佩泽希齐扬总统。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: The SAHA 2026 Defense & Aerospace Exhibition, organized by Europe’s largest defense and aerospace cluster, SAHA, is about to begin. SAHA Chairman Haluk Bayraktar: In a time of rapidly evolving threats and shifting global power, #SAHA2026 brings together trust, collaboration, and advanced technology. We are uniting the global defense and aerospace community to build strategic partnerships and help shape the future of security. See you in Istanbul, May 5–9. 🌐 400,000 m² exhibition space 🌍 120+ countries 🏢 1,700+ companies 🤝 25,000+ B2B meetings 👥 200,000+ visitors 📍 Istanbul Expo Center (IFM)
text_zh: 由欧洲最大的国防和航空航天集群 SAHA 组织的 SAHA 2026 国防与航空航天展览会即将开始。SAHA 主席 Haluk Bayraktar：在威胁迅速演变和全球力量格局更迭的时代，#SAHA2026 汇聚了信任、协作和先进技术。我们正在团结全球国防和航空航天界，建立战略伙伴关系，并助力塑造安全未来。5月5日至9日，伊斯坦布尔见。 🌐 400,000 平方米展览空间 🌍 120+ 个国家 🏢 1,700+ 家公司 🤝 25,000+ 场 B2B 会议 👥 200,000+ 名参观者 📍 伊斯坦布尔博览中心 (IFM)

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Multiple Israeli helicopters reported over the Quenitra and west Daraa Governorate by local sources. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 U.S. State Department published the full ceasefire agreement: The text of the following statement was agreed to by the Government of Israel and Government of Lebanon: Following productive direct talks on April 14 between the governments of the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The State Department released the full text of a ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon, brokered after direct talks in Washington on 14 April. The truce, as announced by the State Department, begins on 16 April at 17:00 EST for an initial period of ten days, with possible extension by mutual agreement. Israel retains the right to take all necessary measures in self-defence against planned, imminent or ongoing attacks. Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and other armed groups from carrying out attacks against Israeli targets. Lebanon’s security forces are recognised as having exclusive responsibility for the country’s sovereignty and national defence. The two countries will engage in good-faith direct negotiations, facilitated by the U.S., toward a lasting peace and security agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 美国国务院发布了完整的停火协议：以下声明文本已由以色列政府和黎巴嫩政府达成一致：继4月14日两国政府之间富有成效的直接会谈之后……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国国务院发布了以色列和黎巴嫩之间停火协议的全文，该协议是在4月14日于华盛顿进行直接会谈后促成的。正如国务院所宣布的那样，停火协议于美国东部时间4月16日17:00开始，初步期限为十天，经双方同意可延长。以色列保留针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。黎巴嫩将采取有意义的步骤，防止真主党和其他武装团体对以色列目标发动袭击。黎巴嫩安全部队被公认为对该国主权和国防负有排他性责任。两国将在美国的协助下，本着诚意进行直接谈判，以达成持久的和平与安全协议。 @wfwitness

text: U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against planned, imminent, or ongoing attacks. Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and other non-state armed groups in the territory of Lebanon from carrying out any attacks against Israeli targets.
text_zh: 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。黎巴嫩将采取有意义的步骤，防止真主党和黎巴嫩境内的其他非国家武装团体对以色列目标发动任何袭击。

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: The Lebanon ceasefire will include Hezbollah, I think Hezbollah will stick to the ceasefire. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044850089928077815/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：黎巴嫩停火协议将包括真主党，我认为真主党会遵守停火协议。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044850089928077815/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump: I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now. If it happens, it'll be announced fairly soon. That'll give us free oil, free Hormuz Strait. Everything will be nice. And I think your oil price will go down to lower than what it was before. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统：我认为我们目前正在进行非常成功的谈判。如果达成，很快就会宣布。这将给我们带来免费的石油、免费的霍尔木兹海峡。一切都会很好。而且我认为你们的油价会降到比以前更低的水平。推文

text: Netanyahu: I spoke with Trump… he is determined to continue the naval blockade and to dismantle Iran’s remaining nuclear capabilities. He believes he can remove this threat once and for all.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：我与特朗普进行了交谈……他决心继续海上封锁并拆除伊朗剩余的核能力。他相信他可以一劳永逸地消除这一威胁。

text: Open Source Intel Lloyds List: “At least eight vessels have crossed the US blockade line and are heading for Iranian ports or to load Iranian cargo” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 劳埃德名单（Lloyds List）：“至少有八艘船只越过了美国封锁线，正驶向伊朗港口或准备装载伊朗货物” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: When we asked NATO allies to get involved in a very minor skirmish by comparison to what it could be, they weren't there, so I don't think they would be there for a large skirmish. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044848640703799424/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：当我们要求北约盟国参与一场与可能发生的情况相比非常小的冲突时，他们没有出现，所以我认为他们不会参与大规模冲突。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044848640703799424/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: How much longer will Americans continue to see high gas prices? Trump: They’re not very high. They’ve come down very much. Reporter: $4 a gallon still. Trump: That’s what ABC says. But the stock market is up. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044848181700100319/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 记者：美国人还要多久才能看到高油价？特朗普：它们并不高。它们已经下降了很多。记者：每加仑仍然要4美元。特朗普：那是美国广播公司（ABC）说的。但股市上涨了。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044848181700100319/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Over 40 Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon in the last two hours. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044847638269292977/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 过去两小时内，以色列对黎巴嫩南部进行了40多次空袭。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044847638269292977/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: If a deal is signed in Islamabad, I might go tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：如果协议在伊斯兰堡签署，我可能会去。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 President Trump on NATO allies: When they've had problems over the years, we were there. When we asked them to get involved in a very minor skirmish by comparison to what it could be, they weren't there, so I don't think they would be there for a large skirmish. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2044847328566095972/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 特朗普总统谈北约盟国：多年来他们遇到问题时，我们都在场。当我们要求他们参与一场与可能发生的情况相比非常小的冲突时，他们没有出现，所以我认为他们不会参与大规模冲突。 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2044847328566095972/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. State Dept: Initial period of Israel Lebanon ceasefire may be extended by mutual agreement between Lebanon and Israel if progress is demonstrated in negotiations tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国国务院：如果谈判取得进展，黎巴嫩和以色列之间的以色列-黎巴嫩停火初步期限经双方同意可延长。推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Israel will allow humanitarian aid into southern Lebanon for the first time tomorrow. Trucks from Samaritan's Purse, a Christian evangelical organization, will enter three Christian villages, Rmeish, Debl, and Ain Ebel near Bint Jbeil. Hundreds of Lebanese residents remained in the villages after committing not to allow Hezbollah to operate from within them. The aid trucks were inspected today by Israeli security and will enter tomorrow under IDF escort. N12. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新消息 🔴 以色列明天将首次允许人道主义援助进入黎巴嫩南部。基督教福音派组织“撒玛利亚救援会”（Samaritan's Purse）的卡车将进入宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）附近的三个基督教村庄：Rmeish、Debl 和 Ain Ebel。数百名黎巴嫩居民在承诺不允许真主党在村内活动后留在了村里。援助卡车今天已由以色列安全部门检查，明天将在以色列国防军（IDF）的护送下进入。N12。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. State Dept: Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and other non-state armed groups in the territory of Lebanon from carrying out any attacks against Israeli targets I think we heard this before… tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国国务院：黎巴嫩将采取有意义的步骤，防止真主党和黎巴嫩境内的其他非国家武装团体对以色列目标发动任何袭击。我想我们以前听过这个……推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the new Iranian leaders are much more intelligent and moderate, reiterating his opinion that a deal is close: "Their new leaders, the ones that have replaced them, it's a regime change. They are much more, I think, frankly, intelligent and more moderate. But we have a real chance to make a deal very soon with Iran." tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，新的伊朗领导人要聪明得多、温和得多，并重申了他认为协议即将达成的观点：“他们的新领导人，那些取代他们的人，这是一次政权更迭。我认为坦率地说，他们要聪明得多、温和得多。但我们确实有机会很快与伊朗达成协议。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 US STATE DEPT ON CEASEFIRE: ISRAEL SHALL PRESERVE ITS RIGHT TO TAKE ALL NECESSARY MEASURES IN SELF-DEFENSE, AT ANY TIME, AGAINST PLANNED, IMMINENT, OR ONGOING ATTACKS. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新消息 🔴 美国国务院关于停火的声明：以色列应保留在任何时候针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: I am all about the gospel, I am about is as much as anybody can be. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044845678975733843/video/1 tweet

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel would remain within Lebanon at the established ATGM line: "We remain in Lebanon in a thickened security strip. This is not the five points that existed before the Operation Roaring Lion. It is a security strip that starts at the sea and continues to Mount Dov and the entrances of Hermon to the Syrian border. A security strip 10 kilometers thick that is much stronger, much more continuous, and much more solid than what we had before." tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将留在黎巴嫩既定的反坦克导弹（ATGM）防线内：“我们留在黎巴嫩的一个加厚安全带内。这不是‘咆哮狮子行动’（Operation Roaring Lion）之前的五个点。这是一个从海边开始，一直延伸到多夫山（Mount Dov）和黑门山（Hermon）入口，直到叙利亚边境的安全带。一个10公里厚的安全带，比我们以前拥有的更强大、更连续、更稳固。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: The blockade is maybe more powerful than the bombing, if you want to know the truth. Reporter: Are you going to make the Arab countries pay a portion of.. Trump: I think they're going to make that contribution. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044845157585989740/video/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor Trump falsely claimed the pope said Iran can have a nuclear weapon, which he did not, and also said Iran agreed not to pursue one, despite no evidence beyond a rejected 5-year proposal. This follows his earlier claims that Iran’s nuclear program was “obliterated” last year. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044845028015587523/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普错误地声称教皇说伊朗可以拥有核武器，教皇并没有这么说，他还声称伊朗同意不寻求核武器，尽管除了一个被拒绝的5年提案外没有证据。这紧随他早些时候声称伊朗的核计划去年被“彻底摧毁”的说法。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044845028015587523/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says if needed he would extend the Iran war ceasefire: "I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now, and I think it'll be, if it happens, it'll be announced fairly soon and that'll give us free oil, free Hormuz Strait. Everything will be nice." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044845018578325726/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 特朗普说如果需要，他会延长伊朗战争停火协议：“我认为我们目前正在进行非常成功的谈判，我认为如果达成，很快就会宣布，这将给我们带来免费的石油、免费的霍尔木兹海峡。一切都会很好。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044845018578325726/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump: We have a very good relationship with Iran right now, as hard as it is to believe. I think it's a combination of about four weeks of bombing and a very powerful blockade. The blockade is maybe more powerful than the bombing, if you want to know the truth. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统：我们现在与伊朗的关系非常好，尽管这很难相信。我认为这是大约四周的轰炸和非常强大的封锁共同作用的结果。如果你想知道真相，封锁可能比轰炸更强大。推文

text: Netanyahu on Lebanon: We remain in Lebanon in a reinforced security zone—we are not leaving. This is a security belt that stretches from the sea to Mount Dov and the approaches to Mount Hermon, up to the Syrian border—a ten-kilometer-wide zone that is much stronger, more continuous, and more solid than before.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡谈黎巴嫩：我们仍留在黎巴嫩的一个强化安全区内——我们不会离开。这是一个从海边延伸到多夫山（Mount Dov）和黑门山（Mount Hermon）入口，一直到叙利亚边境的安全地带——一个十公里宽的区域，比以前更强大、更连续、更稳固。

text: Netanyahu on Lebanon: We have two fundamental demands: first, the disarmament of Hezbollah; second, a sustainable peace agreement—peace through strength.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡谈黎巴嫩：我们有两个基本要求：第一，解除真主党的武装；第二，达成可持续的和平协议——以实力求和平。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 U.S. Secretary of State published the full ceasefire agreement: The text of the following statement was agreed to by the Government of Israel and Government of Lebanon: Following productive direct talks on April 14 between the governments of the Republic of Lebanon (hereinafter “Lebanon”) and the State of Israel (hereinafter “Israel”), brokered by the United States of America, Lebanon and Israel have reached an understanding in which both nations will work to create conditions conducive to lasting peace between the two countries, full recognition of each other’s sovereignty and territorial integrity, and establishing genuine security along their shared border, while preserving Israel’s inherent right to self-defense. Both countries recognize the significant challenges faced by the Lebanese state from non-state armed groups, which undermine Lebanon’s sovereignty and threaten regional stability. Both countries understand that those groups’ activities must be curtailed, such that the only forces authorized to bear arms in Lebanon will be the Lebanese Armed Forces (LAF), Internal Security Forces, Directorate of General Security, General Directorate of State Security, Lebanese Customs and Municipal Police (hereinafter “Lebanon’s security forces”). Israel and Lebanon affirm that the two countries are not at war and commit to engaging in good-faith direct negotiations, facilitated by the United States, with the objective of achieving a comprehensive agreement that ensures lasting security, stability, and peace between the two countries. To that end, the United States understands the following: Israel and Lebanon will implement a cessation of hostilities beginning on April 16, 2026, at 17:00 EST, for an initial period of ten days, as a gesture of goodwill by the Government of Israel, intended to enable good-faith negotiations toward a permanent security and peace agreement between Israel and Lebanon. This initial period may be extended by mutual agreement between Lebanon and Israel if progress is demonstrated in the negotiations and as Lebanon effectively demonstrates its ability to assert its sovereignty. Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against planned, imminent, or ongoing attacks. This shall not be impeded by the cessation of hostilities. Besides this, it will not carry out any offensive military operations against Lebanese targets, including civilian, military, and other state targets, in the territory of Lebanon by land, air, and sea. From April 16, 2026, at 17:00 EST, forward, with international support, the Government of Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and all other rogue non-state armed groups in the territory of Lebanon from carrying out any attacks, operations, or hostile activities against Israeli targets. All parties recognize Lebanon’s security forces as having exclusive responsibility for Lebanon’s sovereignty and national defense; no other country or group has claim to be the guarantor of Lebanon’s sovereignty. Israel and Lebanon request that the United States facilitate further direct negotiations between the two countries with the objective of resolving all remaining issues, including demarcation of the international land boundary, with a view to concluding a comprehensive agreement that ensures lasting security, stability, and peace between the two countries. The United States understands that the above commitments will be accepted by Israel and Lebanon concurrently with this announcement. These commitments are designed to create the conditions necessary for good-faith negotiations toward enduring peace and security. The United States further intends to lead international efforts to support Lebanon as a component of its broader efforts to advance stability and prosperity in the region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 美国国务卿公布了完整的停火协议：以下声明文本已由以色列政府和黎巴嫩政府达成一致：继黎巴嫩共和国（以下简称“黎巴嫩”）政府与以色列国（以下简称“以色列”）政府于4月14日在美利坚合众国斡旋下进行富有成效的直接会谈后，黎巴嫩和以色列达成谅解，双方将致力于为两国之间的持久和平、全面承认彼此的主权和领土完整、并在共同边界沿线建立真正的安全创造有利条件，同时保留以色列固有的自卫权。两国认识到黎巴嫩国家面临非国家武装团体带来的重大挑战，这些挑战破坏了黎巴嫩的主权并威胁到地区稳定。两国理解必须限制这些团体的活动，使得黎巴嫩境内唯一获准携带武器的部队将是黎巴嫩武装部队（LAF）、内部安全部队、总安全局、国家安全总局、黎巴嫩海关和市政警察（以下简称“黎巴嫩安全部队”）。以色列和黎巴嫩确认两国并未处于战争状态，并承诺在美利坚合众国的推动下，进行真诚的直接谈判，目标是达成一项确保两国之间持久安全、稳定与和平的全面协议。为此，美利坚合众国理解如下：以色列和黎巴嫩将于2026年4月16日美东时间17:00开始实施停火，为期十天，作为以色列政府的一种善意姿态，旨在促成双方为达成以色列与黎巴嫩之间的永久安全与和平协议进行真诚谈判。如果谈判取得进展，且黎巴嫩有效证明其维护主权的能力，经黎巴嫩和以色列双方同意，这一初始期限可以延长。以色列应保留在任何时候针对已计划、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。这不应受到停火的影响。除此之外，以色列将不会在黎巴嫩领土上对黎巴嫩目标（包括平民、军事和其他国家目标）进行任何陆地、空中和海上的进攻性军事行动。自2026年4月16日美东时间17:00起，在国际支持下，黎巴嫩政府将采取有意义的步骤，防止真主党及黎巴嫩领土上的所有其他流氓非国家武装团体对以色列目标进行任何攻击、行动或敌对活动。各方承认黎巴嫩安全部队对黎巴嫩的主权和国防负有排他性责任；没有任何其他国家或团体有权声称自己是黎巴嫩主权的担保人。以色列和黎巴嫩请求美利坚合众国推动两国进行进一步的直接谈判，目标是解决所有剩余问题，包括国际陆地边界的划定，以期达成一项确保两国之间持久安全、稳定与和平的全面协议。美利坚合众国理解，上述承诺将由以色列和黎巴嫩在发布此公告的同时予以接受。这些承诺旨在为朝着持久和平与安全进行的真诚谈判创造必要条件。美利坚合众国进一步打算领导国际努力支持黎巴嫩，作为其推动该地区稳定与繁荣的更广泛努力的一部分。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they are very close to a deal with Iran: "We're very close to a deal with Iran." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they are looking into reports of the sudden deaths of U.S. scientists, with Trump "hoping" it was random, adding that they are looking at possible foreign interference: Well, I hope it's random, but we're going to know in the next week and a half. I just left the meeting on that subject. So, pretty serious stuff. Some of them were very important people, and we'll look at it over the next day. It's possible that some foreign adversary is in the United States to open these people up. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示他们非常接近与伊朗达成协议：‘我们非常接近与伊朗达成协议。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他们正在调查美国科学家突然死亡的报告，特朗普“希望”这只是随机事件，并补充说他们正在调查是否存在外国干预：嗯，我希望这是随机的，但我们在未来一周半内就会知道。我刚结束关于这个主题的会议。所以，事情相当严重。其中一些人是非常重要的人物，我们将在接下来的一天里对此进行调查。有可能是有外国对手在美国境内对这些人下手。 @wfwitness

text: Reporter: Scientists with access to classified stuff, nuclear materials, aerospace—they've gone missing or turned up dead in the last couple months. What's happening? Trump: I hope it's random. We are going to know in the next week and a half. Pretty serious stuff. Hopefully coincidence.
text_zh: 记者：接触机密资料、核材料、航空航天领域的科学家——他们在过去几个月里失踪或被发现死亡。发生了什么？特朗普：我希望这是随机的。我们将在未来一周半内知道。事情相当严重。希望只是巧合。

text: Reporter: Iran is going to execute four more protesters, including the first woman protester. What do you tell Iran? Trump: Tell that to the Pope.
text_zh: 记者：伊朗将处决另外四名抗议者，包括第一名女性抗议者。你对伊朗有什么话要说？特朗普：去告诉教皇吧。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 U.S. President Donald Trump reiterated his call for the U.K. to start drilling and open up the north sea, while removing windmills: "UK should open up the North Sea of one of the greatest in the world, and they should use it instead of buy oil from…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they are very close to a deal with Iran: "We're very close to a deal with Iran." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普重申他呼吁英国开始钻探并开放北海，同时拆除风车：‘英国应该开放北海，这是世界上最伟大的海域之一，他们应该利用它，而不是从……购买石油’ ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示他们非常接近与伊朗达成协议：‘我们非常接近与伊朗达成协议。’ @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that: "You cannot let Iran have a nuclear weapon or the entire world could be gone." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 U.S. President Donald Trump reiterated his call for the U.K. to start drilling and open up the north sea, while removing windmills: "UK should open up the North Sea of one of the greatest in the world, and they should use it instead of buy oil from Norway and other places that use the same source. They should use it. And they're not doing it. They're doing windmills and windmills Windmills do one thing. You know what they do? Put you out of business." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示：‘你不能让伊朗拥有核武器，否则整个世界都可能消失。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普重申他呼吁英国开始钻探并开放北海，同时拆除风车：‘英国应该开放北海，这是世界上最伟大的海域之一，他们应该利用它，而不是从挪威和其他使用相同来源的地方购买石油。他们应该利用它。但他们没有这样做。他们在搞风车，风车，风车只会做一件事。你知道它们做什么吗？让你破产。’ @wfwitness
